utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Includes physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs, plus a total health cost. Fully specified with costs. 2) property_coverage: States home/contents insurance with plan name, monthly cost, and detailed coverage amounts. Fully specified with costs. 3) travel_coverage: Provides plan name, monthly cost, and detailed coverage limits. Fully specified with costs. 4) additional_services: Lists enhancement services (adventure sports, equipment protection) with monthly costs and a total. Fully specified with costs. 5) total_budget: Provides monthly and annual totals and extra details. Fully specified. All 5 required items are present and include the requested details with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each plan name in the final coverage plan and match exactly to entries in the ground-truth ratings. Mappings found: Physical health = LifeFirst Standard Plan (primary_health_coverage.physical_health). Mental health = InsurePlus Standard Plan (primary_health_coverage.mental_health). Home contents = VitalPlus Standard Coverage (property_protection.home_content). Travel insurance = InsurePlus Standard Plan (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance). Additional services include Adventure Travel Coverage (travel_enhancement_services) and Technology Protection (property_enhancement_services).
